history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front (north) is lava, so I cannot move forward. The wall is to my left, so the only safe direction to explore is east (right) into an empty cell. I will turn clockwise to face east.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor cell (`.`) based on the observation. Since it is safe, I can move forward to explore further and potentially find the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is lava, and the cell to my left is also lava, while to my right is a wall. The only safe direction is backward (south), which is currently unknown. I need to turn around to face south. I will first turn clockwise to face east, then later turn clockwise again to face south before moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom row facing up, but the cell directly ahead is a wall (#). The left and right cells are free floor (.). The goal is not visible, so I need to explore. I will turn clockwise to face right, then I can move forward to the empty cell on the right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (row7, col4) facing up. The cell directly in front is floor, safe to move. The left cell is a wall, and the right cell is lava. Moving forward is the only safe action to explore further.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The forward cell (north) is a wall, the left cell (west) is a wall, and the right cell (east) is lava. There is no safe adjacent cell to move into. The only possible direction to eventually move is backward (south), but that requires turning twice. I will turn clockwise to face east first, then I can turn again next step to face south.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead (north) is lava, so moving forward is impossible. To the right (east) is a floor cell, so turning clockwise to face east will allow a safe move. No goal is visible yet, so exploration is needed.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom row facing north. The cell directly ahead (north) is lava, to the left (west) is lava, and to the right (east) is a wall. The only unexplored direction is south (behind), which is not visible but likely passable. I will turn clockwise to face east, then later turn again to face south and move into the unknown area.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
Estou na posição (linha6, col3) virado para cima. A célula à minha frente é uma parede (#), portanto não posso mover para frente. Olhando ao redor, a célula à minha esquerda (col2) é um piso (.) e à direita (col4) é parede. Para explorar e tentar encontrar o objetivo, o melhor é virar no sentido anti-horário para ficar virado para a esquerda e então poder avançar para a célula vazia.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor cell ('.'), so it is safe to move forward. I will advance to explore the unknown area and search for the goal 'O'.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,4) facing north. The cell directly ahead (6,4) is a safe floor cell. No other immediate safe moves exist: left is lava, right is wall. Moving forward will allow us to explore further and potentially find a path to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The only safe cell to move into is directly ahead (north), which is floor. The goal is not visible in the current observation, so I need to explore. Moving forward will allow me to progress upward and potentially discover new areas.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom of the view, facing up. The cell directly ahead (north) is floor ('.'), safe to move. To the left is lava, to the right is a wall, and behind is out of bounds. No goal is visible in the current observation, so moving forward is the only viable option to explore further.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front (north) is lava, so I cannot move forward. The cell to my left (west) is floor, which is safe. I will turn counter-clockwise to face west, allowing me to move onto that safe cell in the next step.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is two columns to the right of the top of the current column. The cell directly ahead (north) is a safe floor tile. I can proceed straight north along column 4, which is clear of lava all the way to the top row, then turn east to reach the goal. So my next move is to step forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at the bottom center, facing north. The goal is located at the top row, two columns to the right. The cell directly ahead (north) is a safe floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal. I will continue north until I reach the row of the goal, then turn east.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,4) facing north. The goal O is visible at (3,6). The cell directly in front of me (6,4) is a floor '.' so it is safe. I can move forward to get closer to the goal. After moving up, I will need to continue north and then turn east to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north (up) at position (6,3). The goal O is at (3,5). The cell directly ahead (5,3) is a floor cell (.) and is safe. Moving forward will bring us closer to the goal, as we can see a clear path: straight up three steps to (3,3), then right two steps to (3,5). Therefore, the next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. Directly ahead is a safe floor cell. The goal is located to the north and east. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal without stepping on lava or walls. The path ahead is clear: after moving forward, I will continue north and then east to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
O agente está na linha 7, coluna 4, voltado para cima (norte). A célula à frente (norte) é um piso (.) na linha 6, coluna 4, que é segura. O objetivo O está na linha 6, coluna 6, que está a duas células a leste dessa posição. Mover para frente é o primeiro passo para se aproximar do objetivo.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is two cells to the east (right) of the agent. The cell directly north is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. To move east, I need to turn clockwise to face east, then I can move forward to the floor cell at (row7, col5) and then to the goal. So my next action should be to rotate clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row6, col3, facing north. The cell directly in front (row5, col3) is a floor '.', which is safe. The goal 'O' is two cells ahead at row4, col3. Moving forward will bring the agent closer to the goal. No obstacles in the immediate path.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north, and the goal O is directly in front of it one cell ahead. The cell is not lava or wall, so moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
